recommendations.title: When the Bough Breaks
recommendations.overview: A surrogate mother harbors a deadly secret desire for a family of her own with the husband who is expecting to raise her child.

recommendations.title: Uma Quase Dupla
recommendations.overview: Keyla the police officer and the unprepared detective Claudio could not be more incompatible. However they are forced to form a duo to solve the series of mysterious murders that are happening in the quiet city of Joinlândia.

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.

recommendations.title: Van Helsing: The London Assignment
recommendations.overview: It tells of the events before the film, in which monster hunter Gabriel Van Helsing travels to London to investigate a series of horrific, and decidedly supernatural murders, being committed by the mad scientist Dr. Jekyll, in the form of his evil al

recommendations.title: Max Payne
recommendations.overview: A DEA agent whose family was slain as part of a conspiracy, and an assassin out to avenge her sister's death, join forces to solve a series of murders in New York City.

recommendations.title: The Hoarder
recommendations.overview: Ella discovers a terrifying secret when she becomes trapped in an underground storage facility. To survive she must join forces with a group of strangers, each with something to hide.

recommendations.title: Dead Sea
recommendations.overview: Stranded in the open sea after a fatal accident, a young woman and her two friends are rescued by a fishing vessel's captain, unaware that the ship harbors a chilling secret.

recommendations.title: The Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: A documentary about conspiracy theories takes a horrific turn after the filmmakers uncover an ancient and dangerous secret society.

recommendations.title: Inmate Zero
recommendations.overview: There's a zombie outbreak after a medical trial in an international detention and medical facility on an isolated island. An ex US Special Forces/bodyguard woman inmate and a guard form a team.
